## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Bridget McGillivray and Wiets Rossouw to discuss roles, responsibilities, and current operations at Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Wiets primarily supports Jimmy, Kyle, and managing editors, handling contracts, meeting coordination, and various administrative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Current workflow involves duplicative efforts across multiple platforms (Notion, Atio, Slack, email), which may need optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Bridget plans to take over most financial responsibilities initially to understand systems better](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team is experiencing high growth and increased workload, especially since January](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Topics

### Role Distribution and Responsibilities

  - [Wiets supports Jimmy, Kyle, and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Handles contracts, meeting coordination, client page updates, and administrative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Alice manages Marcel's inbox and sales-related tasks](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Wiets and Alice collaborate on task allocation and invoicing](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Molly Chambers handles some remote contracts as a freelance contractor](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### Onboarding and Access Management

  - [Wiets manages onboarding for new team members](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Sets up email addresses, admin access, and other necessary accounts](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Bridget still needs access to some systems (e.g., QuickBooks, Workable)](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

### Financial Processes

  - [Wiets and Alice handle invoicing through QuickBooks](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Remote.com used for contractor payments](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Proposal to approve invoices earlier (21st-26th of previous month) to ensure timely payments](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### Communication and Meetings

  - [Weekly check-in with Kyle, ad-hoc communication with Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Monday morning kickoff call with Marcel and Bruno to discuss priorities](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Multiple platforms used: Notion, Atio, Slack, email](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Duplicative efforts in updating information across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Potential for streamlining processes and reducing redundancies](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

### Wiets' Background

  - [10 years in political operations](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Experience in HR, including recruitment and employee wellness](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Finance experience, including implementing financial systems](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to gain access to QuickBooks and other necessary systems](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Explore setting up a new QuickBooks account for C Corp](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Review current workflow and explore opportunities for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Discuss with Marcel about streamlining processes and reducing duplicative efforts](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Consider implementing a more structured weekly check-in between Bridget and Wiets](https://fathom.video/share/PcEDxebVzaNjUf9HcVB9_jcsTuJ-p3hc?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
